CVE-2023-27536.title: curl: GSS delegation too eager connection re-use
CVE-2023-27536.description: An authentication bypass vulnerability exists in libcurl prior to v8.0.0 where it reuses a previously established GSS-negotiate connection.

CVE-2024-99999.title: curl: hypothetical unfixed vulnerability
CVE-2024-99999.description: A hypothetical vulnerability in curl that has not yet been fixed.
